initial_bridge_false_positive.reason: The initial bridge verifier treated quoted runtime path arguments as command mismatches. The clean token span was closed before this verifier normalization was fixed.
initial_bridge_false_positive.fixed_by: Normalize harmless quotes around simple path arguments before command comparison.

subagent_outcome.summary: The local supervisor invoked the auditor subagent and repaired authority fields plus source-gate/source-next-move fields before validators passed.

score_caveat.description: The report score stayed at 0.0 even though source facts and gate decisions passed deterministic validation. Future report verifiers should either compute score deterministically or require score consistency with validator outcomes.

comparison_to_v4.interpretation: With the same five-source split and cleaner protocol guardrails, v7 reduced measured paid coordinator cost relative to the prior accepted economics run while preserving bridge acceptance and deterministic validation.

interpretation: V7 is the first clean economics datapoint after the no-rerun and bridge-verifier hardening. The local Copilot supervisor completed the graph-shaped five-artifact audit with one materializer run, subagent invocation, all deterministic validators passing, and no delete commands. The result supports the hierarchy design for local-supervisor orchestration, but the subagent audit quality is still not clean because supervisor repair was required.
